content.en:
The Supreme Void Demon needs to live in one fortress after another, each of which is incomparably large and contains many voids inside.

Often, a fortress has about a few hundred Supreme Dao Void Demons, but now that the Supreme Dao Void Demons are at war with the Supreme Dao Realm of the Infinite Domain, the number of Supreme Dao Void Demons here should not be much.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian shot directly.

The terrifying attack power had already surpassed the Fivefold Dao Realm, directly bombarding this fortress.

In an instant, the fortress was torn apart.

"Ahhh!!h

A Supreme Dao Void Demon who was healing on the fortress could not react before his body was torn apart and fell one by one, and only two of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm survived.

They immediately called for help and then tried to escape.

But the next moment.

Two rays of light penetrated their bodies, and even the most divine defenses could not protect them, and they were directly shattered.

Before they died, they sensed the seventh sequence of supreme rules, and they couldn't believe it at all.

A supreme Dao realm who has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme dao will almost become a sevenfold supreme dao realm, how rare it is to appear on the battlefield.

After killing these Supreme Dao Void Demons, Ye Tian took away the items on their bodies and quickly left.

Next, he wantonly killed the Supreme Dao Void Demon behind the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and after some of the fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demons stationed in the area learned about it, they joined forces to rush over, but they were all killed by Ye Tian strongly.

Soon, the Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon stationed in the garrison made a move.

......

"Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon River!"

Ye Tian sensed the traces of the Xianghe River, and was not surprised that he was found so quickly.

Every time he sneaks in, he's quickly spotted.

After all, even the Infinite Heavenly Palace was able to find his true body one by one from a long distance, and the Supreme Dao Void Demon naturally had similar treasures to lock his location.

However, he didn't have to be afraid of this Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon now.

"It's you!"

The Sixfold Dao Void Demon Xianghe was furious when he saw Ye Tian.

Ye Tian sneaked in here many times and killed a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons, each time he disintegrated his body, as if he was committing suicide, but every time he was still alive.

Therefore, he had a great headache for Ye Tian.

You can't kill such a guy.

However, it is better to do it, otherwise more Supreme Void Demons will be killed.

He didn't care about the lives of these supreme demons, but if they lost too much, it would be difficult for them to break through this battlefield, and they would be punished from above.

Rumble!!!!

He made a bold move, and countless black rays of light killed Ye Tian.

If it was in the past, Ye Tian would have been killed in an instant, but now, he naturally has a way to resist.

Airplanes!

The seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules were integrated into the Supreme Dao Vajra body, making itself extremely tough, and he forcibly withstood a blow from the river, only suffering a slight injury.

Followed by.

Ye Tian used the Dao Flow Body Technique to escape, and with the blessing of the seventh sequence of the Dao Rules, his speed was much faster than in the past.

"What, the Seventh Sequence of Solstice Rules !!!"

He was jealous.

From the point of view of cultivation, Ye Tian was only a double Dao realm, and he actually comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Dao.

What a wickedness this is!

Along the way, the river kept chasing and killing, but Ye Tian was able to escape easily.

As a result, the river chased after him.

Ye Tian didn't care if this replica body would fall, he tried his best to kill the Dao Void Demon.

Gradually, the Supreme Dao Void Demon was killed by him batch after batch.

The other side.

A number of Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons led a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons and Supreme Dao Demons to engage in large-scale battles with the Supreme Dao Realm of the Infinite Domain, constantly invading.

Suddenly.

When they received the message, their faces changed.

"It's not good, that abominable Supreme Dao Realm has slashed into our rear again, and a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons have been killed, even the Fifth Rank Supreme Dao Void Demon is not the texture of the other party's move, and the river is chasing him, but he can't catch up! That guy has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao!"

"Retreat, retreat first, and kill that guy!"

"If we continue to let him kill, we will all lose a lot of people, then it will not be worth it!"

Whew!

These Supreme Void Demons withdrew.

The Taisu Palace Lord will not chase after them when they reach the Dao Realm, after all, their strength is not as good as these Dao Void Demons, and to chase and kill is to die, and it would be good to be able to keep the territory.

Soon.

One by one, the sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon went to hunt down Ye Tian, and even His Highness The Hague was interested.

"Double to the Dao realm, comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence to the Dao, I don't know if he can beat me!"

His Highness The Hague had this idea.

......

Rumble!

Another Fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon died at Ye Tian's hands.

Just as he was about to continue his escape, a Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon appeared in front of him again.

"They have withdrawn, my replica body has caused such a big sensation, it is estimated that it will be difficult to escape!"

However, he can still escape, and he has not yet reached the point of despair.

Swish!

He used the Daoliu Body Technique again to escape.

And then, one after another Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons surrounded him, narrowing the scope so that he had no way to escape.

But at this moment, a Fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon appeared.

"Hey, there's one more Fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, kill this guy, and then disarm this copy body!" Ye Tian intended.

And this Fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon is none other than His Highness The Hague.

"Hahaha, I found it, it's just a double Dao Void Demon, I want to see how powerful it is!"

His Highness The Hague held the six-pattern supreme dao weapon long knife and slashed at Ye Tian with one sword.

Rumble!!!

The power of this blow almost touched the threshold of the sixfold Dao realm.

However.

Ye Tian directly ignored this blow, blocked it with his body, and then stabbed him with a shot.

Rumble!!!!!

His Highness The Hague's body was stabbed, and life-saving objects emitted light to protect his body.

But the terrifying impact still made his body crack, but fortunately, the life-saving thing that recovered his injuries quickly allowed his body to heal, but his entire body was also knocked away I don't know how far.

"This ......"

His Highness The Hague was stunned.

If it weren't for the many life-saving things on his body, he would have been killed in one blow just now.

He always thought that he was very powerful, and felt that it was only two to the Dao realm, even if he was evil, what would it be?

The other five realms were killed, because they were too weak.

As a result, he was almost killed.

"Your Highness The Hague, that Supreme Dao Realm is too powerful, you better leave first, let's deal with him!"

A Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon said.

His Highness The Hague did not dare to say anything big and left immediately.

Soon.

A number of Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons surrounded Ye Tian, and Ye Tian directly disintegrated his copy body as before.

Seeing this scene, these Sixfold Supreme Dao Realms were extremely angry.
